zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Allard於1759年3月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可時，她的父親Uriah Allard33歲，母親Prudence Child29歲。她於1784年2月21日與Joseph Vinton在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特杜德利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1839年5月14日享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Allard于1759年3月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可时，她的父亲Uriah Allard33岁，母亲Prudence Child29岁。她于1784年2月21日与Joseph Vinton在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特杜德利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1839年5月14日享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Allard was born on 15 March 1759, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Uriah Allard, was 33 and her mother, Prudence Child, was 29. She married Joseph Vinton on 21 February 1784, in Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 May 1839, at the age of 80.

fr.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Allard est née le 15 mars 1759, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Uriah Allard, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Prudence Child, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Joseph Vinton le 21 février 1784, à Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1839, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Allard am 15. März 1759 in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Uriah Allard 33 und ihre Mutter Prudence Child 29. Sie hat am 21. Februar 1784 in Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Joseph Vinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1839 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Allardが1759年3月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで生まれた時，父Uriah Allardは33歳，母Prudence Childは29歳であった。1784年2月21日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターダドリーでJoseph Vintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1839年5月14日に80歳で死去した。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Allard(이)가 1759년 3월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Uriah Allard(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Prudence Child(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1784년 2월 21일 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 드들리에서 Joseph Vinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1839년 5월 14일 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Allard nasceu em 15 de março de 1759, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Uriah Allard, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Prudence Child, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Joseph Vinton em 21 de fevereiro de 1784, em Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Allard родилась 15 марта 1759 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Uriah Allard было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Prudence Child, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joseph Vinton 21 февраля 1784 г. в местности дудли, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 мая 1839 г. в возрасте 80 лет.
